variants: Hollis Weatherby is a notable name in instructional design, renowned for her influential work titled Octave Emission Protocol. As an active member of the Xenon Model Makers, she combines her passion for model-making with her professional endeavors. Hollis received invaluable mentorship from her doctoral advisor, Oriana Rojas, which greatly shaped her approach to education. Her groundbreaking research has been supported by the Hazelkin Resource Fund, allowing her to develop innovative instructional strategies. Through her various contributions, Hollis continues to enhance the field of instructional design with her creative insights and expertise.
